sentence: 新员工本周都在受训，下周正式上岗。
pinyin: Xīn yuángōng běn zhōu dōu zài shòuxùn, xià zhōu zhèngshì shàng gǎng.
english: New employees are all receiving training this week and will officially start work next week.

meaning: 1. to put down in writing; 2. to take down notes; 3. transcript; 4. re
sentence: 警察对证人的陈述做了详细笔录。
pinyin: Jǐngchá duì zhèngrén de chénshù zuò le xiángxì bǐlù.
english: The police made a detailed transcript of the witness's statement.

sentence: 金融危机使很多企业倒闭。
pinyin: Jīnróng wēijī shǐ hěn duō qǐyè dǎobì.
english: The financial crisis caused many businesses to close down.

meaning: 1. to beat easily; 2. to gain an easy victory
sentence: 主队以三比零轻取对手。
pinyin: Zhǔduì yǐ sān bǐ líng qīngqǔ duìshǒu.
english: The home team easily beat their opponent three to zero.

sentence: 这首民歌被人们传唱了几百年。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu míngē bèi rénmen chuánchàng le jǐ bǎi nián.
english: This folk song has been passed down and sung for hundreds of years.
